title: The Real Reason Giordano Bruno Was Burned at the Stake - Ada Palmer
summary: A conversation between Dwarkesh Patel and Ada Palmer discussing the historical circumstances surrounding Giordano Bruno's execution. Palmer offers perspectives on the actual reasons behind Bruno's fate, likely challenging conventional narratives about religious persecution.
